description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a textured gray fabric. The sofa features a single, wide seat cushion and a continuous, straight backrest, both of which appear to be firmly attached to the frame. The armrests are straight, at the same height as the backrest, and are integrated seamlessly into the overall boxy silhouette. The upholstery displays a subtle woven pattern, giving the surface a slightly textured, matte appearance. The sofa stands on four short, block-style legs that are only partially visible, suggesting a sturdy and stable base. Its overall proportions and neutral color make it suitable for urban public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered lounges.
description: A modern, boxy gray sofa with a single seat cushion, straight armrests, and a continuous backrest, upholstered in subtly textured fabric. The design is minimalist and sturdy, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's straight armrest and the full depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, single seat cushion, continuous backrest, and both straight armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same straight armrest and depth visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the subtle upholstery pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, wide seat cushion and a continuous, attached back cushion; both are uniform in size and firmly integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, partially recessed and likely made of wood or metal, with a simple, sturdy appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with no segmentation or tufting, fully upholstered and attached to the frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Subtle woven texture in a solid gray color, with no visible decorative stitching or patterning.
